changeSet.author: auzun
changeSet.sql: -- Manual migration script: backfill DWC-DP records from dp_dataset into metadata. -- This is intentionally ignore=true and should be run manually where needed. INSERT INTO metadata ( dataset_key, type, created, created_by, modified, modified_by, content, content_json ) SELECT dp.dataset_key, 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type, COALESCE(dp.modified, now()), 'SYSTEM', COALESCE(dp.modified, now()), 'SYSTEM', convert_to(dp.metadata::text, 'UTF8'), dp.metadata FROM dp_dataset dp WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM metadata m WHERE m.dataset_key = dp.dataset_key AND m.type = 'DWC_DP'::enum_metadata_type );
